case_title: TERRANCE STACKWOOD VS. JOSIE C. IP

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO AMEND PARTY NAME NAME BEFORE HEARING (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STACKWOOD, TERRANCE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STACKWOOD, TERRANCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IP, JOSIE C $7,710.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,542.00 INTEREST, $268.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,520.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
